import json


def get_user_cache_key(user_id: int, filters: dict) -> str:
    return f"user:{user_id}:filters:{json.dumps(filters)}"


def get_product_cache_key(product_ids: list) -> str:
    return f"products:{str(product_ids)}"


def get_search_cache_key(params: dict) -> str:
    return f"search:{json.dumps(params)}"


def get_report_cache_key(options: dict) -> str:
    return f"report:{json.dumps(options, sort_keys=True)}"


cache = {}


def fetch_user_data(user_id: int, filters: dict):
    key = get_user_cache_key(user_id, filters)
    if key in cache:
        return cache[key]
    data = load_user_data(user_id, filters)
    cache[key] = data
    return data
